title: Senior Doctor - Alkem Laboratories - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Alkem Laboratories - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Alkem Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Alkem Laboratories:
Alkem Laboratories is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alkem Laboratories!
